[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Troye Mulleshar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]] who worked for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
One week before the scheduled vote for the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]], Mulleshar was one of the Senate Guards assigned to disrupt a protest outside the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. When he attempted to extricate wounded protesters, he and fellow Guard [[Anjavay Rosit]] were clubbed by the crowd and received blunt-force trauma wounds.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|news/1359_1.html|Anti-War Rally Dispersed by Senate Guard}} {{1st}}
